channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. Kanye West's permission to enter country for London festival being reviewed by U.K. government, source says  NBC News
  5. Friends Star Says Kanye West Has Fueled ‘Hatred’ & Hasn’t Apologized Properly  Yahoo

item.title: World Cup MBTA train ticket price announced; T says it will be more affordable than driving - CBS News
item.description:
1. World Cup MBTA train ticket price announced; T says it will be more affordable than driving  CBS News
  2. MBTA to charge $80 for train tickets for World Cup matches at Gillette Stadium  The Boston Globe
  3. MBTA details transit plan, prices for World Cup matches at Gillette  WCVB
  4. MBTA spikes World Cup tickets to Gillette Stadium to $80 -- four times higher than for Patriots games  Boston Herald
  5. Boston’s World Cup fans facing outrageous 400% increase in train ticket pricing  New York Post

item.title: The California Lake Billed as the ‘Saudi Arabia of Lithium’ - The New York Times
item.description:
1. The California Lake Billed as the ‘Saudi Arabia of Lithium’  The New York Times
  2. Newsom promised California 'Lithium Valley.' But the renewable energy bounty has yet to be tapped  Times of San Diego
  3. ‘I could pay my bills off the gold’: Californians say the Gold Rush never ended — and treasure is still turning up. How to cash in on gold  MSN
